[[inst_lb]]
==== LB

*Syntax:* lb [SrcL, SrcR<{.sw,.uw,.neg}><<<shamt>], ->{t, u, Rd}

*Description:* Load 8-bit signed value from [Rs+offset], result to Rd/t/u.

image::../generated/encodings/enc_lb.svg[LB encoding,width=800]
